forecast-period.text: Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the late morning and afternoon. Light winds. Daytime maximum temperatures between 17 and 20.
Sun protection 11:20am to 1:00pm, UV Index predicted to reach 3 [Moderate]

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Medium chance of showers. Light winds becoming west to southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h in the early afternoon then becoming light in the late afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 10 with daytime temperatures reaching around 18.

Partly cloudy. High chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Winds westerly 15 to 20 km/h tending southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h during the morning then becoming light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 9 and 12 with daytime temperatures reaching between 16 and 19.

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog on the western slopes. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Light winds becoming southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h during the morning then becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 8 and 11 with daytime temperatures reaching between 16 and 19.

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely this afternoon. Light winds becoming south to southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h in the early afternoon then becoming light in the late afternoon. Daytime maximum temperatures around 20.
Sun protection 11:30am to 1:00pm, UV Index predicted to reach 3 [Moderate]

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Medium chance of showers. Light winds becoming west to southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h in the middle of the day. Overnight temperatures falling to around 10 with daytime temperatures reaching around 20.

Partly cloudy. High chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Winds westerly 15 to 20 km/h turning southwesterly 20 to 30 km/h during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to between 9 and 12 with daytime temperatures reaching the low 20s.

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog in the north. Slight chance of a shower. Winds south to southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 8 and 11 with daytime temperatures reaching the low 20s.
Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the late morning and afternoon. Light winds. Daytime maximum temperatures around 18.
Sun protection not recommended, UV Index predicted to reach 2 [Low]

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the evening. Light winds becoming westerly 15 to 20 km/h in the middle of the day. Overnight temperatures falling to around 8 with daytime temperatures reaching around 19.

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers. Winds westerly 15 to 20 km/h turning southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to between 9 and 12 with daytime temperatures reaching around 18.

Medium chance of showers, most likely in the morning. Mostly sunny afternoon. Winds southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 8 and 12 with daytime temperatures reaching around 19.
Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers during the morning and afternoon. Light winds. Daytime maximum temperatures around 19.
Sun protection not recommended, UV Index predicted to reach 2 [Low]

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Slight chance of a shower. Light winds becoming west to southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h in the early afternoon then becoming light in the late afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 8 with daytime temperatures reaching around 19.

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog near the eastern border. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Winds westerly 15 to 20 km/h tending southwesterly 20 to 30 km/h during the morning then becoming light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 7 and 10 with daytime temperatures reaching around 19.

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the morning. The chance of morning fog. Winds westerly 15 to 20 km/h tending southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h during the morning then becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 7 and 10 with daytime temperatures reaching around 19.

Partly cloudy. Patchy morning fog near the eastern border. Slight chance of a shower during the morning and afternoon. Light winds becoming southerly 15 to 20 km/h in the morning then becoming light in the late afternoon. Daytime maximum temperatures around 18.
Sun protection not recommended, UV Index predicted to reach 2 [Low]
Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Slight chance of a shower, most likely at night. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to around 7 with daytime temperatures reaching around 18.

Partly cloudy. High chance of showers. Light winds becoming west to southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to around 8 with daytime temperatures reaching around 18.

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the morning. The chance of morning fog near the eastern border. Winds westerly 15 to 20 km/h tending southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h during the morning then becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 7 and 10 with daytime temperatures reaching around 18.

Cloudy. Patchy morning fog near the eastern border. Slight chance of a shower. The chance of a thunderstorm near the eastern border in the late morning and afternoon. Light winds. Daytime maximum temperatures around 20.
Sun protection 11:20am to 12:50pm, UV Index predicted to reach 3 [Moderate]
Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Slight chance of a shower. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to around 8 with daytime temperatures reaching around 20.

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Light winds becoming westerly 15 to 20 km/h during the morning then tending southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h during the day. Overnight temperatures falling to around 7 with daytime temperatures reaching around 20.

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Slight chance of a shower. Light winds becoming south to southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h during the morning then becoming light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 6 with daytime temperatures reaching around 20.
Cloudy. Medium chance of showers during the morning and afternoon. Light winds. Daytime maximum temperatures around 20.
Sun protection 12:20pm to 1:20pm, UV Index predicted to reach 3 [Moderate]

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Slight chance of a shower. Light winds becoming southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h in the early afternoon then becoming light in the late afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 9 with daytime temperatures reaching around 19.

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Light winds becoming west to southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h during the morning then becoming light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 8 with daytime temperatures reaching around 20.

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Medium chance of showers in the southwest, slight chance elsewhere. Light winds becoming southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h during the morning then becoming light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 8 with daytime temperatures reaching around 19.
Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely during this afternoon and evening. Light winds. Daytime maximum temperatures between 18 and 21.
Sun protection 11:10am to 1:10pm, UV Index predicted to reach 3 [Moderate]

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the afternoon. Light winds becoming southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h in the middle of the day then becoming light in the late afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 6 and 9 with daytime temperatures reaching between 17 and 20.

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog in the west. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Winds west to southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h becoming light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 5 and 9 with daytime temperatures reaching between 15 and 20.

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Slight chance of a shower. Light winds becoming south to southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h during the morning then becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 6 and 9 with daytime temperatures reaching between 16 and 20.

Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower. The chance of a thunderstorm in the late morning and afternoon. Light winds becoming south to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h in the middle of the day then tending east to southeasterly in the evening. Daytime maximum temperatures around 20.
Sun protection 11:00am to 1:40pm, UV Index predicted to reach 3 [Moderate]

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Slight chance of a shower, most likely in the afternoon. Light winds becoming south to southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h in the middle of the day then becoming light in the late evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 7 and 11 with daytime temperatures reaching around 19.

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog west of the ranges. Slight chance of a shower south of Hawker, near zero chance elsewhere. Winds southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h becoming light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 6 and 9 with daytime temperatures reaching between 17 and 20.

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog west of the ranges. Slight chance of a shower near the coast, near zero chance elsewhere. Light winds becoming southerly 15 to 20 km/h during the morning then becoming light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 5 and 9 with daytime temperatures reaching between 17 and 20.

Partly cloudy. Patchy fog near the coast early this morning. Slight chance of a shower. Light winds becoming southerly 15 to 20 km/h in the early afternoon then becoming light in the evening. Daytime maximum temperatures in the low 20s.
Sun protection 11:10am to 1:50pm, UV Index predicted to reach 3 [Moderate]

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Slight chance of a shower. Light winds becoming southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h in the middle of the day then becoming light in the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 8 with daytime temperatures reaching between 19 and 22.

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Medium chance of showers south of Streaky Bay, slight chance elsewhere. Winds west to northwesterly 15 to 20 km/h turning southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h during the morning then tending southeast to southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 7 and 10 with daytime temperatures reaching the low 20s.

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Slight chance of a shower south of Streaky Bay, near zero chance elsewhere. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to around 8 with daytime temperatures reaching the low 20s.

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the late morning and afternoon. Light winds becoming southerly 15 to 20 km/h in the early afternoon then becoming light in the evening. Daytime maximum temperatures around 20.
Sun protection 11:10am to 1:20pm, UV Index predicted to reach 3 [Moderate]

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Slight chance of a shower. Light winds becoming south to southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h in the morning then becoming light in the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 10 with daytime temperatures reaching between 18 and 21.

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Light winds becoming westerly 15 to 25 km/h during the morning then tending southwesterly during the day. Overnight temperatures falling to around 10 with daytime temperatures reaching around 20.

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Slight chance of a shower. Light winds becoming southerly 15 to 20 km/h during the day then becoming light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 9 with daytime temperatures reaching around 20.

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the late morning and afternoon. Light winds becoming south to southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h in the middle of the day then becoming light in the evening. Daytime maximum temperatures around 20.
Sun protection 11:50am to 12:50pm, UV Index predicted to reach 3 [Moderate]

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the evening. Light winds becoming westerly 15 to 25 km/h in the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to between 7 and 10 with daytime temperatures reaching around 20.

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the morning. Winds west to northwesterly 15 to 20 km/h turning southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to around 11 with daytime temperatures reaching the low 20s.

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Slight chance of a shower. Light winds becoming southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h during the day then becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 7 and 11 with daytime temperatures reaching the low 20s.

Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower north of Coober Pedy, most likely during this afternoon and evening. Near zero chance of rain elsewhere. The chance of a thunderstorm east of Stuart Highway from late this morning. Winds south to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light in the evening. Daytime maximum temperatures in the low to mid 20s.
Sun protection 10:20am to 2:30pm, UV Index predicted to reach 4 [Moderate]

Mostly sunny. The chance of morning fog. Slight chance of a shower east of Stuart Highway, near zero chance elsewhere. Winds south to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h tending south to southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h in the middle of the day then tending south to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h in the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 7 and 11 with daytime temperatures reaching the low 20s.

Mostly sunny. The chance of morning fog south of Coober Pedy. Slight chance of a shower south of Woomera, near zero chance elsewhere. Light winds becoming southeast to southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h during the morning then tending east to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 6 and 9 with daytime temperatures reaching the low 20s.

Mostly sunny. The chance of morning fog south of Coober Pedy. Light winds becoming east to southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to around 8 with daytime temperatures reaching the low 20s.

Cloudy. Very high chance of showers in the far northeast, slight chance elsewhere. The chance of a thunderstorm. Light winds becoming south to southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h in the morning. Daytime maximum temperatures between 19 and 22.
Sun protection 10:20am to 2:00pm, UV Index predicted to reach 4 [Moderate]

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Slight chance of a shower east of Leigh Creek in the morning and afternoon. Near zero chance of rain elsewhere. Winds southerly 20 to 30 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 9 and 15 with daytime temperatures reaching between 19 and 23.

Mostly sunny. The chance of morning fog south of Yunta. Medium chance of showers south of Yunta, most likely in the afternoon. Near zero chance of rain elsewhere. Winds southerly 20 to 30 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 7 and 12 with daytime temperatures reaching between 19 and 22.

Mostly sunny. The chance of morning fog south of Yunta. Slight chance of a shower south of Yunta, near zero chance elsewhere. Winds south to southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h tending south to southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to between 7 and 11 with daytime temperatures reaching between 18 and 23.
